description: SimpleAgent baseline - only 1 win (2% win rate), avg 3 attempts when winning
ImprovedAgent with lowercase and full word list - 2 wins (4%), avg 4.5 attempts when winning

asi.baseline_comparison: lower win rate but higher avg_attempts_on_win

description: ImprovedAgent with fixed constraint logic - 3 wins (6%), avg 5.67 attempts when winning

asi.hypothesis: Fixed constraint logic to check same letter not any letter
asi.improvement: win_rate up to 6% from 4%, but avg_attempts_on_win worse at 5.67

description: ImprovedAgent with slate start and letter frequency - 3 wins (6%), avg 3.67 attempts when winning

asi.hypothesis: Better starting word (slate) and letter frequency-based selection

description: ImprovedAgent with fixed present_letters logic - 43 wins (86%), avg 4.4 attempts when winning

asi.hypothesis: Fixed present_letters counting - now just tracks presence without strict min counts
asi.improvement: win_rate up to 86% from 6%! avg_attempts_on_win=4.4 vs baseline 3.67

description: ImprovedAgent optimized - 42 wins (84%), avg 4.26 attempts when winning

asi.hypothesis: Added more optimal starting words (but still using slate)
